attr.title: BRKCHRD
attr.desc: Live chord-performance instrument with functional harmony, sixteen synthesis presets, deterministic or expressive voice leading, instrument-aware voicings and optional performance FX.
attr.inst: Verified on TrimUI Brick with Knulli. L1 cycles CHORD/SOUND/PERF FX, L2 holds alternate layers, R1/R2 select temporary chord banks and Select opens Settings. Start+Select saves and exits.
